steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: The word therefore signals the conclusion must be tied to the premise: because balance affects perception and emphasis, what a photograph conveys must depend on how it is balanced.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: ”Contingent on” means dependent on—it directly captures that what the photograph conveys is determined by how it is balanced. The others contradict this logic, don't fit grammatically, or express a different relationship. This matches choice C — C is correct.
